code_prompt_defaults.question_text: Use this abacus rule: in each column, beads moved toward the center bar are active. An active upper bead counts as 5, and each active lower bead counts as 1. Read the columns labeled 100, 10, and 1 from left to right. Which option gives the number shown?
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the pixel-space bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected option card
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_place_digit_readout: Use this abacus rule: in a column, beads moved toward the center bar are active. An active upper bead counts as 5, and each active lower bead counts as 1. Which option gives the digit shown in the column labeled {target_place_label}?
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_place_digit_readout: set "annotation" to the pixel-space bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected option card
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_place_digit_readout: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_target_value_match_label: set "annotation" to the pixel-space bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected abacus option card
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_target_value_match_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
